DROP TABLE [EDW].[SUMM_FACT_ZIP_CODE_PERFORMANCE]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[SUMM_FACT_ZIP_CODE_PERFORMANCE]
( 
	[Division] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[EntryMonth] [date]  NULL,
	[ZipCode] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LeadSubSourceID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[ProductID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[BranchID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LeadCount] [int]  NULL,
	[ProspectCount] [int]  NULL,
	[ApptSet] [int]  NULL,
	[NetIssue] [int]  NULL,
	[Demo] [int]  NULL,
	[Sold] [int]  NULL,
	[NetSold] [int]  NULL,
	[CancelledCount] [int]  NULL,
	[CreditDeclineCount] [int]  NULL,
	[NetSalesAmount] [decimal](38,4)  NULL,
	[CancelledAmount] [decimal](38,4)  NULL,
	[CreditDeclineAmount] [decimal](38,4)  NULL,
	[GrossSalesAmount] [decimal](38,4)  NULL,
	[JobCount] [int]  NULL,
	[HouseholdsPerZipCode] [int]  NULL,
	[AverageHouseValue] [int]  NULL,
	[IncomePerHousehold] [int]  NULL,
	[PopulationEstimate] [int]  NULL,
	[MedianAge] [decimal](38,4)  NULL,
	[City] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[County] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[CBSA_Name] [nvarchar](255)  NULL,
	[MSA_Name] [nvarchar](255)  NULL,
	[State] [nvarchar](100)  NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = HASH ( [ZipCode] ),
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
GO
